name: Corn Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onion and celery; sauté for 5 minutes or until tender and lightly browned.
3. Add basil and the next five ingredients (basil through garlic) and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Remove from the heat; stir in vinegar.
5. Combine the onion mixture, meat, breadcrumbs, half of the corn, and parsley in a large bowl; set aside.
6. Place the remaining corn and egg in a food processor. Process until almost smooth.
7. Add to the meat mixture; stir well (mixture will be wet).
8. Shape the meat mixture into a 9 x 4 inch loaf.
9. Place the meat loaf on a broiler pan coated with cooking spray.
10. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
11. Brush tomato sauce over meat loaf; bake an additional 35 minutes.
12. Let stand 5 minutes before slicing.
